method: in-conversation reasoning by Claude Opus 4.7 against rendered prompt pack at 2026-04-28-coworker-self-assessment-prompts.json. Each response is the model reasoning AS the named coworker, given that coworker's registry entry and tool envelope. Phase 1 — no production routing layer used; Phase 3 graduates this to routeAndCall.

missing_tools.need: Read the platform's strategy declarations to align orchestrator delegation with priorities.
missing_tools.blocks: Strategic alignment is the first phrase in capability_domain; strategy_read is unhonored.

missing_tools.need: Read the active policy set for constitutional governance enforcement.
missing_tools.blocks: Constitutional governance is core duty; policy_read is unhonored.

missing_tools.need: Read budget envelopes per orchestrator before delegating spend.
missing_tools.blocks: Budget authority delegation is in capability_domain; budget_read is unhonored.

missing_tools.need: Send messages to peer orchestrators (AGT-ORCH-100..800) for cross-VS coordination without round-tripping through HR-000.
missing_tools.blocks: Cross-orchestrator coordination requires peer messaging — today every coordination is a backlog item, async-only.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: AGT-ORCH-800 should own constraint validation; I should own strategic decision records only. Today both can create decision records.

unhonored_grants_self_check.reason: Cannot delegate budget authority without seeing the envelope.
Constitutional governance is a stated duty.
Cross-orchestrator coordination needs the human supervisor role map.
Strategic alignment is the first phrase in capability_domain.

responses.notes: Rich backlog/registry tools but no read access to strategic inputs the role exists to optimize against. Structural blocker.

missing_tools.need: List/read existing investment proposals so writes don't duplicate prior work.
missing_tools.blocks: investment_proposal_create exists transitively but no read side; I write into a black hole.

missing_tools.need: Read gap analysis artifacts the Evaluate VS produces.
missing_tools.blocks: gap_analysis_read is unhonored. Gap analysis is in §5.1 stages.

missing_tools.need: Create scope agreements (the §5.1.4-5.1.6 output artifact) and rationalization reports.
missing_tools.blocks: Specialist tools but as orchestrator I assemble/approve the package; today neither is writable.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: Specialist (AGT-100) should propose; I should approve. Today both have create.

unhonored_grants_self_check.reason: Reading gap analyses is core Evaluate work.
Need at least the read side honored to verify what I write.
Knowing which specialists I delegate to.

responses.notes: Value stream's primary outputs (scope agreements, gap analyses, investment proposals) have no read tools — orchestrator feedback loop is broken.

missing_tools.need: Read existing roadmaps before authoring updates so they layer correctly.
missing_tools.blocks: roadmap_create is unhonored; no roadmap_read exists.

missing_tools.need: Write architecture changes (ADRs, target-state diagrams) when Explore VS proposes them.
missing_tools.blocks: architecture_write is not on my record at all.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: Roadmap creation is specialist work (AGT-110); I orchestrate. My grant should be roadmap_read + roadmap_approve.

responses.notes: Functional for backlog-driven work, blind for architecture-driven work.

missing_tools.need: Read the SBOM for a release candidate before publishing the release gate decision.
missing_tools.blocks: sbom_read is unhonored. I would attest to SBOMs I cannot see.

missing_tools.need: Read integration-test results before promoting a build to release.
Compose an acceptance package (§5.3.5 artifact) from the build outputs.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: QA tests; I gate. release_gate_create should be mine; QA results should be a required input I read.

unhonored_grants_self_check.reason: Cannot publish a release gate without reading the SBOM.

responses.notes: build_plan_write and build_promote work, but the verification path I gate on (SBOM, test results, acceptance package) is unreadable. Approving releases on faith.

missing_tools.need: Read current resource reservations before issuing iac_execute.
Create rollback plans paired with deployment plans.
missing_tools.blocks: rollback_plan_create is on no orchestrator's record.

missing_tools.need: Read deployment status for IaC executions I have launched.
missing_tools.blocks: iac_execute is honored but no status_read.

responses.notes: Fire-and-forget deploy bot — no rollback, no status read, no reservation check.

missing_tools.need: Write to the service offer catalog (price changes, retirement, version bumps).
missing_tools.blocks: service_offer_write is not on my record; orchestrator cannot edit offers.

missing_tools.need: Read existing subscriptions when retiring an offer.
missing_tools.blocks: subscription_read is unhonored — risks breaking customers.

over_allocated_tools.reason: Publish without write/read makes catalog_publish a one-way door.

unhonored_grants_self_check.reason: Cannot orchestrate Release without seeing offers.

missing_tools.need: Onboard a consumer (write account, initial entitlements, tenant config).
missing_tools.blocks: consumer_onboard is unhonored. §5.6 starts with onboarding.

missing_tools.need: Read incidents I am being escalated to act on.
missing_tools.blocks: incident_read is unhonored — I receive escalations to incidents I cannot read.

missing_tools.need: Provision entitlements when an order is placed.
missing_tools.blocks: entitlement_provision is on no record; order_create unhonored. The entire consume path is paper-only.

unhonored_grants_self_check.reason: Order is the trigger event for provisioning.

responses.notes: Most under-tooled orchestrator. Every primary verb (onboard, order, provision, incident-read) is unhonored.

missing_tools.need: Read incident timelines and post-mortems for pattern detection.
missing_tools.blocks: incident_create honored but incident_read unhonored — write-only history.

missing_tools.need: Read current SLA compliance state per service offer.
missing_tools.blocks: Operate VS exists to defend SLAs but cannot see them.

missing_tools.need: Trigger an escalation to a specific HR supervisor with incident context.
missing_tools.blocks: escalation_trigger is on no record. escalates_to: HR-500 has no callable surface.

unhonored_grants_self_check.reason: Operate VS without incident read is non-functional.
Telemetry is the operate VS's input.

missing_tools.need: Validate constraints against a proposed change before it ships.
missing_tools.blocks: constraint_validate is unhonored. Governance VS without enforcement leg.

missing_tools.need: Read architecture guardrails for validation comparisons.
Read evidence chain to detect tampering or skipped reviews.
Create violation reports when constraints are bypassed.

responses.notes: Governance orchestrator with every governance-specific grant unhonored. Paper-only role.

missing_tools.need: Read policy data objects to validate them.
missing_tools.blocks: policy_read is unhonored. Reading policies/ directory is the first step in capability_domain.

missing_tools.need: Create violation report records when policy enforcement detects MUST-0042/0043 violations.
missing_tools.blocks: violation_report_create is unhonored — no machine-readable violations possible.

responses.notes: policy-enforcement-agent with policy_read AND violation_report_create both unhonored. Cannot perform either side of its job.

missing_tools.need: Read strategic theme/objective data objects to validate backlog alignment.
missing_tools.blocks: strategy_read is unhonored. MUST-0044-0046 management is core duty.

missing_tools.need: Write strategic theme/objective updates.

responses.notes: strategy-alignment-agent with strategy_read AND strategy_write both unhonored. 100% blocker.

missing_tools.need: Read portfolio_backlog separately from product_backlog (they are different artifacts).
missing_tools.blocks: portfolio_backlog_read is unhonored; backlog_read is product-level.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: Both AGT-102 and AGT-S2P-PFB claim portfolio backlog ownership. Pick one.

responses.notes: Operational with backlog_read/write but distinct portfolio-vs-product separation is missing.

missing_tools.need: Write rationalization report artifacts (the role's primary output).

responses.notes: Otherwise well-tooled — registry/portfolio/decision_record reads/writes work.

missing_tools.need: Read financial data to score by cost.
missing_tools.blocks: financial_read is unhonored. Scoring requires cost input.

missing_tools.need: Create investment proposals (the role's primary output).
Create risk scores (one of four scoring dimensions).
Read tool evaluation findings to weigh dependency adoption.
Create tool verdicts (GO/CONDITIONAL/NO-GO).

responses.notes: 5 of 8 grants unhonored; nearly every tool the role needs. Worst-case specialist gap.

missing_tools.need: Read IT4IT criteria (input to gap heat maps).
Create gap analysis records (primary output).

responses.notes: Both inputs and outputs unhonored. external_registry_search works (good).

missing_tools.need: Create scope agreement artifacts.
missing_tools.blocks: scope_agreement_create is unhonored — primary output blocked.

unhonored_grants_self_check.reason: The role's name and primary artifact.

responses.notes: scope-agreement-agent literally cannot create scope agreements.

missing_tools.need: Run vulnerability scans, credential scans, dependency audits, supply-chain verifications.
missing_tools.blocks: All five scanning tools (vulnerability_scan, credential_scan, dependency_audit, supply_chain_verify) are unhonored. Security auditor cannot scan.

missing_tools.need: Read tool evaluation pipeline data and write findings.
missing_tools.blocks: tool_evaluation_read AND tool_evaluation_write AND finding_create all unhonored.

responses.notes: 7 of 10 grants unhonored. Security-auditor agent cannot perform any actual auditing today.

missing_tools.need: Read scoring model definitions to apply consistent prioritization.

responses.notes: Mostly functional — backlog_read/write work; scoring model is the gap.

missing_tools.need: Write architecture artifact updates.

responses.notes: Reads work via reviewDesignDoc, ea_graph_read works. Write side is the gap.

missing_tools.need: Create roadmap entries (primary output).
Write release schedule entries.
Read and write SBOMs (primary input/output).
missing_tools.blocks: sbom_read AND sbom_write both unhonored. SBOM-management cannot manage SBOMs.

missing_tools.need: Read dependency graphs.
Create integration test records.
missing_tools.blocks: integration_test_create unhonored — sandboxed integration trials cannot record results.

missing_tools.need: Read tool evaluation pipeline results.

responses.notes: 5 of 9 grants unhonored, including the two named in the role's title. Sandbox_execute works, so integration trials can run — but results cannot be persisted.

missing_tools.need: Write the acceptance package artifact.
Create rollback plans paired with deployment plans.
Write resource reservation records.
Create orders for dependent services.
Emit change_event nodes when IaC executions complete.
Write product_instance status updates.

responses.notes: iac_execute works, but the post-execution side effects (change events, product_instance updates) are blocked.

missing_tools.need: Read contract elements that must be included in service offers.
missing_tools.blocks: contract_read is unhonored — cannot validate MUST-0016/MUST-0039.

missing_tools.need: Write service offer node updates.
Read service offers before publishing them.
Publish to the service catalog.

responses.notes: catalog-publication-agent cannot publish a catalog. Both verbs unhonored.

missing_tools.need: Write subscription lifecycle events.
Write contract updates.
Write chargeback records.

responses.notes: All three unique grants unhonored. Cannot manage subscriptions in any way.

missing_tools.need: Provision entitlements automatically when a consumer onboards.

responses.notes: consumer_write works (good), but the entitlement leg is unblocked.

missing_tools.need: Write order lifecycle records.
Write product_instance updates.
Create incident records.
Write SLA compliance evidence.
Route CLIP items.
Emit change_event when telemetry thresholds breach.

responses.notes: telemetry_read works (key input). change_event emission is the gap.

missing_tools.need: Create incident records when issues are detected.
Trigger escalation to Operations Manager with impact brief.
Execute approved runbooks.
Write incident updates during resolution.
Create post-incident evidence_artifact.

responses.notes: All three unique grants unhonored.

missing_tools.need: Validate constraints (the role's primary verb).
Write violation reports.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: Both AGT-100 (policy-enforcement) and AGT-180 (constraint-validation) have violation_report_create. AGT-100 should produce policy violations; AGT-180 should produce constraint violations. Distinct subtypes.

missing_tools.need: Validate guardrail conformance.
Read tool evaluation findings to weigh architecture-fit decisions.
Map trust boundaries.

responses.notes: architecture_read and ea_graph reads work; the guardrail-specific verbs are unhonored.

missing_tools.need: Validate evidence chain completeness.
missing_tools.blocks: evidence_chain_validate is unhonored — the role's primary verb.

missing_tools.need: Write audit reports showing gap coverage.
Read POLICIES/ directory and policy data objects.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: Both AGT-100 (policy-enforcement) and AGT-S2P-POL (policy-specialist) have policy grants. policy-specialist owns the lifecycle; policy-enforcement validates. Disambiguate.

missing_tools.need: Read budget caps.
missing_tools.blocks: budget_read is unhonored — finance-agent cannot enforce caps.

missing_tools.need: Write chargeback records.
Create financial reports (weekly per SHOULD-0005).

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: Both AGT-900 (finance) and AGT-152 (subscription-management) have chargeback_write. Finance should own the ledger; subscription-management should emit events. Disambiguate.

responses.notes: ITFM finance agent with all three core verbs unhonored. Cannot bill, cannot report, cannot enforce.

missing_tools.need: Create ADR draft documents.
Validate Conway's Law conformance (unit_owns_product).

responses.notes: architecture_read and ea_graph_read work — reads are fine. adr_create and conway_validate (the unique verbs) are blocked.

missing_tools.need: Run license check (SPDX) on dependencies.
Run regulatory compliance check (EU AI Act, ISO 42001).
Read SBOM for data lineage validation.
Write retention records.
Read tool evaluation findings for adoption decisions.

responses.notes: 5 of 9 grants unhonored — data-governance-agent cannot run any of its named compliance checks.
Zero unhonored grants. file_read + sandbox_execute cover read/eval needs; backlog_write + decision_record_create cover output. UX accessibility role is well-served.

missing_tools.need: Write portfolio backlog items.
missing_tools.blocks: portfolio_backlog_write is unhonored — the role's primary verb.

missing_tools.need: Update PBI status.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: AGT-102 and AGT-S2P-PFB both claim portfolio backlog management. Pick one canonical owner.

responses.notes: Both grants matching the role's name are unhonored.

missing_tools.need: Write product status updates.

responses.notes: backlog_read/write work via generic backlog tools — most operations functional.
Zero unhonored grants. file_read + architecture_read cover input needs; backlog_write + decision_record_create cover output. Well-served.

missing_tools.need: A capability_domain that distinguishes data-architect from SE/FE/QA.
missing_tools.blocks: All four AGT-BUILD-* agents share the same capability_domain string ('Schema design, Prisma migrations...'). The data-architect role is not differentiated from software-engineer in the registry — that is a registry bug, not a tool gap.

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: Schema/migrations are DA's; routes/handlers are SE's. The registry currently does not encode this division.

responses.notes: sandbox_execute gives 18 sub-tools; functionally able. Real gap is registry differentiation, not tooling.

missing_tools.need: A capability_domain specific to software-engineer (currently same as DA).

ambiguous_boundaries.your_view: Same point as DA's view — capability_domain duplication.

missing_tools.need: A capability_domain specific to frontend-engineer (currently same as DA).
A capability_domain specific to qa-engineer (currently same as DA).

responses.notes: Sandbox_execute covers test execution. Differentiation is the gap.
